finding: Cross-artifact consistency must validate both acceptance logic and the deployment decision's own status/URL invariants. A success status, URL-returned flag, URL syntax, terminal failure status, and rejection reasons are separate fields that can contradict one another unless checked explicitly.
new_checks: require HTTPS deployment URLs without embedded credentials
require success status to carry a returned valid URL
forbid terminal non-success states from carrying a URL or returned-URL flag

verification.route: isolated Node test using source-equivalent committed logic

evidence_strength: committed source plus isolated deterministic runtime test
deployment_blocker: Cloudflare environment credentials and an authenticated workflow dispatch are still required to prove a resolving hostname, served identity, and deployed commit.
privacy_boundary: No secrets, account identifiers, private chat, or health material were read or emitted.
claim_limit: The gate detects contradictory records. It does not prove hostname ownership, deployment availability, exact served bytes, scientific truth, diagnosis, or treatment efficacy.
falsification_route: run the committed test suite in repository CI
wire the validator after acceptance generation and before manifest finalization
show a valid workflow state rejected by the new status/URL contract, or a contradictory state accepted by it
